bills.title: AN ACT RELATING TO CRIMINAL PROCEDURE -- DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PREVENTION ACT
bills.summary: Allows electronic filing of domestic violence/sexual assault reporting forms by law enforcement agencies, enhances the information to be included on those forms, and clarifies that the forms should be submitted monthly.

bills.title: AN ACT RELATING TO COMMERCIAL LAW--GENERAL REGULATORY PROVISIONS -- ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE COMPANION MODELS
bills.summary: Creates additional safety features for AI companion technology that address suicidal ideation, potential physical harm, or financial harm to others expressed by a user, and requires notification that the AI companion does not have human emotions.
bills.officialAbstract: Creates additional safety features for AI companion technology that include addressing suicidal ideation, potential physical harm or financial harm to others expressed by a user. It also requires notification the AI companion does not have human emotions.

bills.title: AN ACT RELATING TO ELECTIONS -- CONDUCT OF ELECTION AND VOTING EQUIPMENT, AND SUPPLIES
bills.summary: Prohibits ICE employees, agents, or officials from being within two hundred feet (200') of any polling place during voting, including early voting and election day voting.
bills.officialAbstract: Prohibits ICE employees, agents or officials from being within two hundred feet (200') of any polling place during voting, including early voting and election day voting.

bills.summary: Changes the direct client contact hour requirements for applicants for licensure as a marriage and family therapist associate and applicants for licensure as a marriage and family therapist.
bills.officialAbstract: Changes the direct client contact hour requirements for applicants for licensure of marriage and family therapist associate and applicants for licensure of marriage and family therapist.

bills.summary: Expands the existing law regarding collaborative practice agreements between pharmacists and physicians to allow other healthcare providers to enter into such agreements, and removes the definition of "collaborative practice committee."
bills.officialAbstract: Expands the existing law regarding collaborative practice agreements between pharmacists and physicians to allow other healthcare providers to enter into such agreements and removes the definition of “collaborative practice committee.”
